query: update architecture plan for milvus standalone mongodb redis docker compose

results.title: omi-channel-be repository exploration
results.content: NestJS monolith with clean-architecture style modules under src/modules; app bootstraps in src/main.ts with URI versioning and swagger at /docs; infra includes PostgreSQL(TypeORM), MongoDB(Mongoose), Redis, SQS+RabbitMQ, websockets via Redis adapter; tests are sparse (7 specs total incl 1 e2e).

results.title: Migrate truyentt from modules to pure clean architecture
results.content: Refactored runtime structure to internal clean architecture only. Added internal/domain (article, category, chapter entities + repository ports), internal/application (DTOs and use cases/services), internal/infrastructure/persistence/mysql (GORM repository adapters), and internal/presentation/http (handlers + route composition). Updated main.go to register routes via internal/presentation/http. Removed all legacy modules/**/*.go files so project no longer uses modules folder. Preserved existing endpoints and article pagination/filter logic plus chapters by article_id endpoint. Verified with go test ./... and modules/**/*.go search returns none.

results.title: Align OMS config module and datasource with omni pattern
results.content: Updated OMS NestJS configuration to omni-style: added global ConfigModule.forRoot in src/app.module.ts; enhanced env parsing in src/config/env.config.ts with DB_* and DATABASE_* alias support plus DATABASE_SSL and DATABASE_SSL_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED; updated src/config/typeorm.ts runtime config to use ssl and disable runtime migrations (migrations: [], migrationsRun:false); updated src/infrastructure/postgres/data-source.ts for CLI migrations with ssl and single default DataSource export. Added @nestjs/config and joi dependencies. Verified with yarn build and yarn migration:run (all migrations executed successfully).

results.title: Create dedicated OMS config module and centralize datasource options
results.content: Added src/config/config.module.ts as a global config module patterned after omni-channel-api using Nest ConfigModule.forRoot with env file precedence and cache. AppModule now imports AppConfigModule instead of inline ConfigModule setup. Refactored src/config/typeorm.ts to centralize common options and export runtime typeOrmConfig (no runtime migrations) plus typeOrmCliConfig (with migrations for CLI). Updated src/infrastructure/postgres/data-source.ts to instantiate DataSource from typeOrmCliConfig with a single default export. Verified with yarn build and yarn migration:show.

results.title: Minder plan translated and expanded
results.content: Translated docs/PLAN.md fully to English and expanded the architecture to include workflow governance, dashboard-configured process enforcement, repository-local state under .minder/, workflow planner node, workflow tools, repository context stores, and MCP-guided next-step orchestration for TDD-style delivery. Document version updated to 3.0 and marked ready for implementation review.
